title: (Bullish Signal) RLMD, RSI Indicator left the oversold zone on June 01, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a signal that RLMD's price could be shifting from a downtrend to an uptrend. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked back and found 17 similar cases where RLMD's RSI Indicator left the oversold zone, and in 17 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 90%. Current price $30.51 is below $31.33 the lowest support line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 04/29/21 - 06/01/21, the price experienced a -17% Downtrend. During the week of 05/24/21 - 06/01/21, the stock fell -15%.

https://preview.redd.it/oos14uvstv271.png?width=1520&format=png&auto=webp&s=144874c3da2d6a7c03592eb03764c853bbc80ba7

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The RSI Indicator entered the oversold zone -- be on the watch for RLMD's price rising or consolidating in the future. That's also the time to consider buying the stock or exploring call options.

The Stochastic Indicator is in the oversold zone. Keep an eye out for a move up in the foreseeable future.

The 10-day Moving Average for RLMD crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on May 26, 2021. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 15 of 18 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 83%.

The 50-day Moving Average for RLMD moved above the 200-day moving average on May 07, 2021. This could be a long-term bullish signal for the stock as the stock shifts to an upward trend.

Following a +2.14% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where RLMD advanced for three days, in 164 of 202 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 81%.

RLMD may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 142 of 174 cases where RLMD Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 82%.

[Full information about signal](https://tickeron.com/news/11547468-relmada-therapeutics-rlmd-32-23-rsi-indicator-left-the-oversold-zone-on-june-01-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
